name: option_a_v2_canonical_manifest.csv
text:
id | title | filename | document_type | domain | source_url | source_organization | provenance_status | download_status | file_format | language | expected_use_cases | benchmark_value | why_included | best_for | notes
PA-001 | Information Security Policy | northwestern_information_security_policy.pdf | policy | policy_and_governance | https://policies.northwestern.edu/docs/information-security-policy.pdf | Northwestern University | official_public_source | verified_open | pdf | en | grounded_qa;policy_review;section_extraction | High structural realism; medium currency | Real institutional security policy with roles, scope, purpose, and implementation sections. | grounded_qa;policy_review;benchmark_realism | Annotate stale next-review metadata; do not present as current best-practice baseline.
PA-002 | Retention of University Records | cornell_retention_of_university_records.pdf | policy | policy_and_governance | https://policy.cornell.edu/sites/default/files/vol4_7.pdf | Cornell University | official_public_source | verified_open | pdf | en | grounded_qa;policy_review;retention_extraction;checklist_generation | Very high | Excellent long-form records-retention policy with explicit schedules and responsibilities. | grounded_qa;policy_review;checklist_generation;benchmark_realism | Keep as flagship public policy artifact.
PA-003 | Supplier Code of Conduct | northeastern_supplier_code_of_conduct.pdf | policy | policy_and_governance | https://finance.northeastern.edu/wp-content/uploads/Supplier-Code-of-Conduct_website_March-2024.pdf | Northeastern University | official_public_source | verified_open | pdf | en | policy_review;risk_review;supplier_expectation_extraction | High | Adds supplier-governance and ethics language not covered by security policy alone. | policy_review;risk_review;benchmark_realism | Good complement to vendor-management policy.
PA-004 | Third Party & Vendor Management Policy | grambling_third_party_vendor_management_policy.pdf | policy | policy_and_governance | https://www.gram.edu/offices/infotech/docs/policies/GSU_Third%20Party_Vendor%20Access.pdf | Grambling State University | official_public_source | verified_open | pdf | en | policy_review;vendor_due_diligence;control_mapping;risk_review | Very high for EvidenceOps alignment | Directly addresses onboarding, annual review, incident reporting, auditing, and documentation retention for third parties. | policy_review;risk_review;checklist_generation;benchmark_realism | Stronger EvidenceOps fit than a generic code of conduct.
PA-005 | Framework for Improving Critical Infrastructure Cybersecurity, Version 1.1 | nist_csf_v1_1.pdf | framework | reference_frameworks | https://nvlpubs.nist.gov/nistpubs/CSWP/NIST.CSWP.04162018.pdf | NIST | official_public_source | verified_open | pdf | en | version_diff;control_mapping;reference_only | High as version baseline | Creates an authoritative public version-pair benchmark against CSF 2.0. | policy_review;checklist_generation;reference_only | Keep explicitly as historical baseline.
PA-006 | The NIST Cybersecurity Framework (CSF) 2.0 | nist_csf_2_0.pdf | framework | reference_frameworks | https://nvlpubs.nist.gov/nistpubs/CSWP/NIST.CSWP.29.pdf | NIST | official_public_source | verified_open | pdf | en | version_diff;control_mapping;checklist_generation;risk_review | Very high | Current authoritative framework reference for control alignment and change detection. | policy_review;checklist_generation;risk_review;reference_only | Pair with PA-005.
PA-007 | Standard Procurement Document - Request for Proposals (Consulting Services) | world_bank_spd_rfp_consulting_services.pdf | procurement_document | contracts_and_procurement | https://thedocs.worldbank.org/en/doc/399371577997897818-0290022019/render/SPDRequestforProposalsConsultantsPREESFDecember2019.pdf | World Bank | official_public_source | verified_open | pdf | en | grounded_qa;clause_extraction;procurement_review;benchmark_realism | Very high | Large, realistic procurement package with complex sections and annexes. | grounded_qa;clause_extraction;benchmark_realism | Anchor long-document benchmark.
PA-008 | Professional Services Agreement | common_paper_psa.md | contract_template | contracts_and_procurement | https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CommonPaper/PSA/main/psa.md | Common Paper | official_public_source_open_standard | verified_open | md | en | clause_extraction;contract_review;reference_only | High semantic value; lower layout realism | Open standard agreement useful for clause comparison and contract QA. | clause_extraction;contract_review;reference_only | Normalize markdown on ingest.
PA-009 | Cloud Service Agreement | common_paper_csa.md | contract_template | contracts_and_procurement | https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CommonPaper/CSA/main/CSA.md | Common Paper | official_public_source_open_standard | verified_open | md | en | clause_extraction;contract_review;risk_review | High semantic value; lower layout realism | Cloud/SaaS-focused agreement adds privacy, security, suspension, and usage-data terms. | clause_extraction;contract_review;risk_review | Useful for SaaS contract benchmarking.
PA-010 | Service Level Agreement | common_paper_sla.md | contract_template | contracts_and_procurement | https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CommonPaper/SLA/main/sla.md | Common Paper | official_public_source_open_standard | verified_open | md | en | clause_extraction;contract_review;reference_only | Medium-high | Gives service-level semantics that complement broader contracts. | clause_extraction;contract_review;reference_only | Compact source; strong for semantic QA, weak for page-layout tests.
PA-011 | Data Processing Agreement | common_paper_dpa.md | contract_template | contracts_and_procurement | https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CommonPaper/DPA/main/DPA.md | Common Paper | official_public_source_open_standard | verified_open | md | en | clause_extraction;contract_review;privacy_review | High semantic value | Adds privacy and security addendum structure that is useful for DPA clause benchmarking. | clause_extraction;contract_review;risk_review | Best used alongside PA-009.
PA-012 | Safety and Health Program Audit Tool | osha_safety_and_health_program_audit_tool.pdf | audit_checklist | audit_and_monitoring | https://www.osha.gov/sites/default/files/SHP_Audit_Tool.pdf | OSHA | official_public_source | verified_open | pdf | en | checklist_generation;grounded_qa;audit_review | High | Structured checklist with maturity-style ratings and evidence prompts. | checklist_generation;grounded_qa;benchmark_realism | Promote from bonus to core.
PA-013 | Sample Checklists for Conducting Internal Monitoring and Auditing | cms_internal_monitoring_auditing_checklists.pdf | audit_checklist | audit_and_monitoring | https://www.cms.gov/files/document/ehrinternalmonitoringja062816pdf | Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services | official_public_source | verified_open | pdf | en | grounded_qa;checklist_generation;audit_review | High with domain annotation | Authentic audit/checklist document with practical monitoring language. | grounded_qa;checklist_generation;benchmark_realism | Annotate that scope is healthcare/EHR-focused.
PA-014 | Contract Review Checklist – Rev. 6/3/25 | palm_beach_county_contract_review_checklist.pdf | contract_checklist | contracts_and_procurement | https://discover.pbc.gov/ofmb/PDF/Contract%20Checklist%20Rev%206.3.25.pdf | Palm Beach County | official_public_source | verified_open | pdf | en | contract_review;checklist_generation;clause_presence_review | Very high for review workflows | Direct contract-review checklist with signature, authority, insurance, termination, audit, and records clauses. | contract_review;checklist_generation;risk_review | Very strong for clause presence / review-flag tasks.
PA-015 | Subcontractor Nonconformance Report (NCR) | lanl_subcontractor_nonconformance_report.pdf | nonconformance_form | incident_and_action_tracking | https://cdn.lanl.gov/files/2276--2_f5aa0.pdf | Los Alamos National Laboratory | official_public_source | verified_open | pdf | en | grounded_qa;risk_review;issue_extraction;reference_only | Very high | Strong nonconformance workflow artifact with technical justification and closure fields. | grounded_qa;risk_review;benchmark_realism | Excellent incident/nonconformance anchor.
PA-016 | Meeting Summary and Action Items | charlotte_meeting_summary_action_items.pdf | meeting_minutes | incident_and_action_tracking | https://www.charlottenc.gov/files/sharedassets/city/v/1/growth-and-development/documents/cbi/meeting-agendas-and-minutes/cbiac-september-10-2025-meeting-summary-and-action-items.pdf | City of Charlotte | official_public_source | verified_open | pdf | en | owner_deadline_extraction;meeting_summary_qa;action_tracking | High | Explicit action items, assignees, and due dates make it useful for action-extraction benchmarks. | grounded_qa;owner_deadline_extraction;benchmark_realism | Extraction quality is imperfect but realistic.
PA-017 | Near-Miss Incident Report Form | osha_near_miss_incident_report_form.pdf | incident_form | incident_and_action_tracking | https://www.osha.gov/sites/default/files/2021-07/Template%20for%20Near%20Miss%20Report%20Form.pdf | OSHA | official_public_source | verified_open | pdf | en | grounded_qa;incident_review;checklist_generation | High | Adds incident/near-miss form realism and structured hazard reporting fields. | grounded_qa;checklist_generation;benchmark_realism | Promote from bonus to core.
PA-018 | NIH Guidance: Institutional Biosafety Committee Meeting Minutes Template and Points to Consider | nih_ibc_meeting_minutes_template.pdf | reference_template | reference_frameworks | https://osp.od.nih.gov/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/Minutes-PtoC-and-Template.pdf | NIH Office of Science Policy | official_public_source | verified_open | pdf | en | reference_only;checklist_generation;meeting_minutes_quality_review | High as template/reference | Directly accessible official template/guidance replacement for broken Nevada template slot. | reference_only;checklist_generation | Use as reference template, not as domain-neutral meeting artifact.

metadata.title: option a v2 canonical manifest
